title: eucephalus albus
intro: Eucephalus albus, also known as White Aster or Mountain Aster, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. Eucephalus albus has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eucephalus albus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
